crime.value: Vehicular homicide while driving under the influence
crime.quote: This guy just killed a man and doesn't even know it yet.

victim.value: Unknown male killed in motor vehicle accident
victim.quote: He may be but that other guy isn't.

culprit_and_motive.value: Mark Owens driving while intoxicated (blood alcohol 2.1), no clear motive beyond drunk driving
culprit_and_motive.quote: He has a blood alcohol level of two point one

investigator.value: Mark Owens appears to be both perpetrator and POV character discovering his crime
investigator.quote: What? I killed a man? What is happening? Can anyone hear me?

red_herring.value: Initial framing suggests Mark is the perpetrator of a vehicular homicide, but his confused state and memory gaps may misdirect from true culpability
red_herring.quote: This guy just killed a man and doesn't even know it yet.

clue_fairness.value: Blood alcohol level of 2.1 disclosed to reader simultaneously with Mark's awakening - key evidence presented fairly
clue_fairness.quote: He has a blood alcohol level of two point one

social_world.value: Medical/legal authority structure - ER doctors, nurses, police officer hold power over helpless, restrained patient
social_world.quote: Mark thrashed about of the table. The ER doctors were evaluating his status.

alibi.value: Mark's memory loss and confusion about timeline creates uncertain alibi - he cannot account for his actions during critical period

investigator_wound.value: Mark himself appears to be both victim and potential perpetrator, creating psychological vulnerability through guilt and memory loss
investigator_wound.quote: What? I killed a man? What is happening? Can anyone hear me?

_meta.title: ebook jeffrey allen white my brother 039 s keeper
